message:
fix: fairness, waiter cleanup, and safety fixes across core async primitives

Address several correctness and robustness issues in core library modules:

- src/combinator/select.rs: Add poll-order alternation to Select and
  round-robin start index to SelectAll. Previously Select always polled A
  first, creating systematic starvation when both branches are frequently
  ready. Now tracks poll_a_first and alternates each Pending cycle.
  SelectAll similarly rotates its start index to avoid always favoring
  the first future in the list.

- src/sync/mutex.rs: Fix waiter queue leak on cancellation and poisoning.
  Extract remove_waiter_and_take_next_waker() helper that properly removes
  the waiter entry and wakes the next eligible waiter when a LockFuture is
  dropped, cancelled, or encounters a poisoned mutex. Previously, cancelled
  or poisoned waiters left stale entries in the queue, blocking subsequent
  lock acquisitions from ever being woken.

- src/sync/notify_bug_test.rs: Update test assertions to match the corrected
  mutex waiter cleanup behavior.

- src/sync/rwlock_lost_wakeup_test.rs: Add additional test coverage for the
  lost-wakeup scenario in RwLock to prevent regression.

- src/cancel/progress_certificate.rs: Rewrite Azuma bound test to use an
  oscillatory observation sequence (alternating +10/-10 from baseline)
  instead of a linear descent. The oscillatory approach generates clearer
  accumulated credit vs initial potential separation, making the test more
  robust and its assertion ("credit > initial ⟹ small bound") more precise.

- src/raptorq/gf256.rs: Fix AVX2 SIMD remainder handling in mul_slices2 and
  addmul_slices2. When the tail remainder is shorter than 32 bytes (one AVX2
  register), fall back to scalar mul_with_table_scalar instead of passing a
  sub-register-width slice to the AVX2 intrinsic path, which could read past
  the allocation boundary.

- src/cx/scope.rs: Minor correctness improvement to scope lifecycle management.

- src/io/read_line.rs: Tighten UTF-8 boundary handling in pending byte buffer.

- src/runtime/reactor/io_uring.rs: Improve io_uring submission queue draining.

- src/transport/aggregator.rs: Fix aggregation flush boundary condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
